user_query: I'm planning a trip to Europe and I want to explore the local cuisine. Can you recommend some popular restaurants and provide their schedules? Also, give me the recent news about Formula 1 races to keep up with the updates. Additionally, fetch the win/loss data of NFL teams for the year 2020.

TaskList.description: Research popular restaurants in Europe and their schedules.
Fetch the recent news related to Formula 1 races.
Retrieve the win/loss data of NFL teams for the year 2020.
